creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
ja-expect-5.26 has following probrems.
(1) patches/patch-ab is broken.
(2) Category is incorrect.
(3) TCL_LIBRARY is incorrect. This means expect can not find any tcl libraries ....

Fix: please commit following patch.
